items.name: Korblox Deathspeaker
items.description: His tribe is widely considered the best and strongest of the twelve Korblox tribes.  No one dares challenge his authority.

items.name: Knights of Redcliff: Paladin
items.description: The Korblox won't go down without a fight, but neither shall the Knights of Redcliff. No retreat, no surrender!

items.name: Ud'zal
items.description: The “All-Father” of the Korblox, Ud’zal was once the true master of the undead until the 12 Deathspeakers plotted his assassination. Now resurrected as an abominable creature of war, Ud’zal is forever under the control of the Deathspeakers.

items.name: Korblox Mage Staff
items.description: Use the powerful dark magic of the Korblox to summon a row of spears from thin air!  If they don't hit your opponent on the way down, they'll hit them as they explode!

items.name: /headless /koblox .... kind of
items.description:
